title: subscription — trait composition
description: Two owned traits. HasSubscription mixed into Workspace exposes ->subscription() + ->plan() helpers. IsBillable is the union wrapper over Cashier's Billable variants — workspaces get whichever variant matches their Application's payment_provider.

owned.description: Mixed into `Workspace`. Adds `subscription()` hasOne (active), `subscriptions()` hasMany (history), `plan()` accessor, `onTrial()` / `subscribed()` / `subscribedToPlan($key)` helpers matching Cashier's semantics.

Union wrapper. Depending on Application.payment_provider, dynamically composes `\Laravel\Cashier\Billable` (Stripe) or `\Laravel\Paddle\Billable` (Paddle). Provides a uniform surface (`createCheckoutSession()`, `redirectToBillingPortal()`, `reportUsage()`) regardless of underlying provider.
owned.notes: Cashier's traits add ~15 columns to the workspaces table (stripe_id, pm_type, trial_ends_at, etc). Migration authored in workspaces module extends this into a bridge migration.

audit.reason: Subscription state changes are compliance-material — SOX 404 requires auditable history for revenue recognition.

plan.notes: NO BelongsToWorkspace — Plans are Application-scoped, not workspace-scoped.

subscription.notes: HasAudit critical for SOX. NO Searchable (subscription rows are internal + high-cardinality).

subscription_event.notes: Append-only. NO SoftDeletes, NO HasUserstamps (event carries actor_id), NO HasAudit (event IS the audit).
